title: Create Enchantment Industry Plus
description: Adds Sacs where you can fill them with ink so you get ink sacs
body:
Press Leather to get an Empty Ink Sac

You can fill the Empty Ink Sac with Ink to get an Ink Sac or:  
You can drain the Ink Sac to get an Empty Ink Sac and Ink

Use a spout and experience to turn an ink sac into a glow ink sac
